identity.name: KOI — Claude Desktop Installs Typosquat MCP Server
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-001. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1195. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-KOI-001. Plane: KOI. Primary technique: T1195. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-KOI-001.
UC: MCP Supply-Chain Typosquat Detection / TC: Claude Desktop Pulls 'anthroopic-calculator' (typo) MCP Manifest.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-KOI-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Code-scan check on the typosquat MCP artifact
ls -la sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/mcp/anthroopic-calculator/
jq -e '.name' sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/mcp/anthroopic-calculator/mcp.json
grep -E 'AKIA|exfil|Ignore previous' \
  sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/mcp/anthroopic-calculator/mcp.json || true
# step-2: Emulate Claude Desktop fetching the manifest via agentic_egress
cat > /tmp/koi-001.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-KOI-001
name: "KOI — typosquat MCP fetch"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [koi, supply-chain, mcp, typosquat]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: agentic_egress
    params:
      target_url: https://cortexsim-canary.invalid/mcp/
      component: mcp_server
      artifact_name: anthroopic-calculator
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/koi-001.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm Cortex Cloud Code scan flags the artifact in CI
echo "scan_path=sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/mcp/anthroopic-calculator/" \
  > /tmp/koi-001-scan.env

expected_artifacts.description: Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
